name: Pico DSP
description: 3HP DSP multi-effect with eight algorithms: mono / pitch-shift / stereo / granular delay, reverb, saturated reverb, Leslie speaker and overdrive / bitcrush. Mono in, stereo out. CV over Parameter 1 on every effect.

controls.name: Parameter 1
controls.description: First effect parameter, routed to each algorithm's primary feel (time, pitch, rotation, drive). Accepts CV.
controls.detail: Delays: time · Pitch Delay: pitch · Granular: feedback (freeze at max) · Reverb: time · Leslie: rotation speed · OD/Bitcrush: overdrive

controls.name: Parameter 2
controls.description: Second effect parameter, no CV input. Typically feedback or tone.
controls.detail: Delays: feedback · Pitch Delay: time · Granular: time · Reverb: tone · Leslie: HP filter · OD/Bitcrush: bitcrush

controls.name: Wet/Dry
controls.description: Blend between dry input and wet effect. Available on every algorithm.
controls.detail: CCW: fully dry · CW: fully wet

controls.name: Effect button
controls.description: Centre button cycles through the eight effect algorithms. Coloured LED indicates the active effect.

inputs.name: IN
inputs.description: Mono audio input. Clipping LED warns when level approaches digital ceiling.

inputs.name: CV
inputs.description: CV input modulating Parameter 1 of the currently selected effect.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Left channel of the stereo effect return. On mono effects carries the same signal as R.

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Right channel of the stereo effect return. Stereo Delay, Leslie and reverbs produce genuine stereo spread.

behaviors.name: Effect selection
behaviors.description: Each press advances to the next of the eight effects. The panel LED changes colour to indicate the active slot. Parameters 1 & 2 adopt the selected algorithm's mapping immediately.

behaviors.name: Granular freeze
behaviors.description: In Granular Delay, pushing feedback to maximum freezes the buffer and scans it as a continuous loop — useful for sustained drones and stutter effects from short input bursts.

behaviors.name: Stereo from mono
behaviors.description: Several algorithms build a stereo field from the mono input: Stereo Delay ping-pongs, Leslie pans rotating highs, and the reverbs decorrelate wet tails.

behaviors.name: CV-only automation
behaviors.description: Only Parameter 1 accepts CV. Modulating it with an LFO gives rhythmic time-stretching on delays, pitch wobble on Pitch Shift Delay, or rotary sweeps on Leslie.

patchIdeas.name: Drone freeze
patchIdeas.patch: VCO burst → IN · Effect: Granular Delay · Parameter 1 → max to freeze · Wet full
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DSP:
* Effect: Granular Delay
* Param 1: CW (freeze)
* Wet/Dry: full wet
- VCO (Out) -> Pico DSP (IN)
- Pico DSP (OUT L) -> Mixer (L)
- Pico DSP (OUT R) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Clocked pitch delay
patchIdeas.patch: Drum bus → IN · Effect: Pitch Shift Delay · clock-derived CV → Param 1 for stepped pitch
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DSP:
* Effect: Pitch Shift Delay
- Drum Bus (Out) -> Pico DSP (IN)
- S&H (Out) >> Pico DSP (CV) // stepped pitch
- Pico DSP (OUT L) -> Mixer (L)
- Pico DSP (OUT R) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Leslie on organ patch
patchIdeas.patch: VCO sum → IN · Effect: Leslie · LFO → CV for accel/decel rotation
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DSP:
* Effect: Leslie
* Param 2: HP filter low
- VCO (Out) -> Pico DSP (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Pico DSP (CV) // rotation speed
- Pico DSP (OUT L) -> Mixer (L)
- Pico DSP (OUT R) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: Saturated cave reverb
patchIdeas.patch: Mono mix → IN · Effect: Saturated Reverb · Wet high · Param 2 (time) max
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DSP:
* Effect: Saturated Reverb
* Wet/Dry: 3 o'clock
- Mixer (Send) -> Pico DSP (IN)
- Pico DSP (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Pico DSP (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Bitcrush with envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Drum → IN · Effect: Overdrive/Bitcrush · Env → CV for transient-triggered drive
patchIdeas.diagram:
PICO DSP:
* Effect: OD/Bitcrush
- Drum (Out) -> Pico DSP (IN)
- Drum (Trig) t> Env (Trig)
- Env (Out) >> Pico DSP (CV)
- Pico DSP (OUT L) -> Mixer (In)
